name: Namespace Badge
description: Color-coded badge for content namespaces: @official (primary/blue), @community (green), and @org:slug (purple). Indicates content provenance and trust level.

standard.description: Standard-sized namespace badge with icon and namespace text.

slots.icon: Namespace icon: shield-check for @official, users for @community, building for @org
slots.label: Namespace text label

compact.description: Small badge with icon only, tooltip shows full namespace. For dense list views.

slots.icon: Namespace icon only, with title attribute for tooltip

pill.description: Pill-shaped badge with background color fill. Prominent display for detail pages.
